name: Low-Fat Fettucini Alfredo with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 cups steamed vegetables (e.g., carrots, broccoli, onions, peas, beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté the steamed vegetables in olive oil or nonstick cooking spray until tender.
3. Add milk and garlic to the skillet. Bring mixture to a simmer, stirring frequently.
4. Reduce heat to low and stir in cheese until melted and sauce thickens.
5. Stir in parsley and pepper. Cook for an additional minute.
6. Toss cooked pasta with vegetable and cheese mixture until well combined.
7. Serve hot and enjoy!
